steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks which data choice supports the claim that traffic congestion worsened over time in smaller areas while also being present in large cities — requiring a trend across years, not a single data point.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A: Gives a single-year value without showing any trend over time. ✗
  • Choice B: Notes a low value without demonstrating worsening congestion. ✗
  • Choice C: Reverses the size comparison, misrepresenting which area is large and which is small. ✗
  • Choice D — 'Miami's delay was always greater than Boise's, yet delay rose in both from 1990 to 2000': Shows congestion in both a large city (Miami) and a small area (Boise), and shows it increased over time in both — directly supporting the claim. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
